name: breadcrumb
title: Breadcrumb
description: Render a path-style breadcrumb trail with custom separators, optional icons, and middle-collapse for long paths. Stateless render primitive — pass crumbs in, place the line at the top of your navigator pane.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Stateless rendering primitive. Build a []breadcrumb.Crumb and call Render(crumbs, Options{}). Crumb.Icon is rendered before Label when set. Use Options.MaxItems to cap the trail length — longer paths collapse the middle into a '…' crumb while keeping the root and the last few segments. Use Options.Separator to change the default ' › ' glyph. RenderPath is a one-liner that splits a slash-joined path into Crumbs.
